narrative:
Moraine City has 4,061 registered voters, with 64.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.7%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.5 percentage points.
